item.title: Why Bots Can't Vote Here: Four Layers of Defense Against the Dead Internet
item.description: Digg shut down because bots flooded free engagement. Liana Banyan built the economics differently — every action costs something real. Here are four structural layers that make manipulation economically irrational.

item.title: Code Breakers Corps Guild
item.description: Standing Security Bounties · IP Ledger Stamps · Guild-Class Security Membership. Solve cryptographic puzzles and platform-substrate challenges to earn Marks and permanent IP attribution.
